/usr/bin/ar qc ../../lib/libobservation_test_fortran.a CMakeFiles/observation_test_fortran.dir/observation_testingTools.F90.o CMakeFiles/observation_test_fortran.dir/test_observation.F90.o CMakeFiles/observation_test_fortran.dir/test_preprocess.F90.o CMakeFiles/observation_test_fortran.dir/test_observation_init.F90.o CMakeFiles/observation_test_fortran.dir/test_observation_update.F90.o
/usr/bin/ranlib ../../lib/libobservation_test_fortran.a
